notes: SHIP v1.14.316 - EXIT button matches the nav bar (owner in chat: 'the exit button needs to look and have the same look as the rest of that nav bar'). Supersedes the .315/handoff gold set-apart pill. The 3 nav tabs use .blabel (var(--orb) Orbitron 600 12.5px, letter-spacing 3.5px, color #3d4f61 dim slate, uppercase) + .btick (14x1.5px #3d4f61), lighting cyan when active. CHANGE: #rd-exit now REUSES those same nav classes (.blabel/.btick) so at rest it reads as a dim-slate Orbitron nav item exactly like COMMAND/WORK/CRASH CART - removed the gold pill entirely (border:1px rgba(244,196,48,.34) + border-radius:14px + background tint + the box-shadow arming glow all deleted; the .rd-exit-lbl/.rd-exit-sub mono classes + the 'HOLD' sublabel dropped - the tabs are single-word labels, so EXIT is just 'Exit'). #rd-exit keeps its fixed narrow width (min-width:64px, NOT flex:1) so it stays set-apart beside #bn-rail without touching the 3-thirds reactor-rail math. The HOLD affordance is preserved on TOUCH: while arming, the .blabel + .btick light GOLD (var(--gold), letter-spacing 4.2px, glow - mirrors the nav's active-lighting idiom but in gold = exit/attention channel, deliberately NOT the cyan tab-active so it doesn't read as selecting a 4th tab) and a bottom 2px gold charge bar fills L->R over .85s (the hold progress). All freeze/wake/gesture/boot-restore JS from .315 UNCHANGED - this is a pure restyle of the resting + arming look. Gates: whole-file brace balance 11891->11890 (-1, removed the pill's arming box-shadow rule; balanced), all 4 inline <script> blocks vm.Script-compile clean, version triple .315->.316 lockstep, uniform LF, ?legacy=1 byte-identical (all body.rd/#rd-exit-scoped; #rd-botnav redesign-only). Browser-verified: EXIT renders as a dim-slate Orbitron nav item matching the 3 tabs, no gold pill; on arm the label+tick+charge light gold. OPEN owner note (flagged): dropped the always-on 'HOLD' hint to match the single-word tabs - discoverability now relies on the on-touch gold charge + the aria-label ('Hold to exit and freeze the app'); say the word if you want a small HOLD hint back. Also the arm-color is GOLD not cyan (kept distinct from tab-select) - trivially switchable to cyan if you'd rather it fully match the active-tab lighting. DEVICE-VERIFY (John): EXIT reads like the other 3 nav items at rest; hold still charges + freezes; tap still does nothing. NEXT: N-12 phase stepper (backlog).
